semantic_description: array_pairwise_sum iterates from i = 0 to n - 1 over three integer arrays. It reads a[i] and b[i], writes out[i] = a[i] + b[i], preserves the full contents of input arrays a and b, and leaves out containing a pointwise sum list of length n. The loop may execute zero times when n = 0. Memory is modified only through the caller-provided output array out; the contract includes a per-element signed-int overflow guard for every computed sum.
